detectImageType: PNG magic bytes 89 50 4E 47 0D 0A 1A 0A -> 'png' accepted
HTML bytes (<html>) with .png name -> detectImageType returns null -> rejected invalid_image
hasUnsafeFilename('../../etc/passwd.png')=true; 'a/b.png'=true (path separators + .. rejected)
MAX_LOGO_BYTES=2097152 (2MB); uploadNurseryLogo checks file.size>MAX before any byte read/network
Content-Type passed to Supabase = contentTypeFor(detected magic-byte type), never client file.type
messages/{th,en}.json have localized invalid_image/bad_filename/too_large strings; LogoUploadError codes map to them
sanitizeExtension('shell.php')=null, ('x.svg')=null, ('ok.png')='png' — non-whitelist ext rejected regardless of magic bytes
CSP header on every page route with script-src 'self' 'nonce-<fresh>' 'strict-dynamic'; x-nonce header present
CSP connect-src/img-src/frame-src include supabase.co, api.stripe.com/js.stripe.com, api.line.me, sentry.io
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff; Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin; Permissions-Policy: camera=(),microphone=(),geolocation=() on every response

Stripe Checkout iframe + test payment requires live Stripe (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY blank in .env.local — gated per H3). CSP frame-src allows js.stripe.com/hooks.stripe.com (config correct)
CSP script-src has nonce + 'strict-dynamic' and NO 'unsafe-inline' → an inline <script> without the per-request nonce is blocked by CSP3 semantics
buildCsp() with NODE_ENV=production -> script-src 'self' 'nonce-..' 'strict-dynamic' — unsafe-eval ABSENT (false); present only in dev (isDev branch)

ci.yml runs pnpm run typecheck + lint + test + build sequentially in the ci job

BEFORE: selector used `BinaryExpression > MemberExpression ~ Literal` — the ESQuery sibling combinator never bridges left/right in a BinaryExpression, so the rule matched NOTHING (eslint exit 0 on `u.role==='owner'`). Proven 0 matches vs 1 with :has(). FIXED to `:has(MemberExpression[property.name=role]):has(Literal[value=/roles/])`; now fires on every role-string equality (either operand order)
After the S9c fix, `pnpm lint` (eslint .) exits 0 on the full codebase — S6's role-string removal was genuine so the now-working rule does not regress
eslint.config.mjs has files-override blocks turning no-restricted-syntax OFF for lib/supabase/middleware.ts and lib/rbac.ts
`eslint .` (flat config, eslint-config-next/core-web-vitals) runs cleanly post-fix; lint exit 0
